description: Certification validator contract. Defines the merge-blocking validation performed in child repo CI. If any check fails, merge is blocked. Fail-closed. No override without ADR.

validation_sequence.name: CERT_EXISTS
validation_sequence.description: certification.json must exist at .garage/certification.json in PR branch.
validation_sequence.on_failure: BLOCK_MERGE: No certification artifact found. Work must go through Garage pipeline.

validation_sequence.name: CERT_SCHEMA_VALID
validation_sequence.on_failure: BLOCK_MERGE: Certification artifact is malformed or missing required fields.

validation_sequence.name: DOCTRINE_VERSION_CURRENT
validation_sequence.description: certification.doctrine_version must match current doctrine_version.json current_version.
validation_sequence.on_failure: BLOCK_MERGE: Certification was issued against outdated doctrine version. Re-certify with current doctrine.

validation_sequence.name: AUDIT_STATUS_PASS
validation_sequence.on_failure: BLOCK_MERGE: Audit did not pass. Review certification.failure_reasons for details.

validation_sequence.name: SIGNATURE_VALID
validation_sequence.description: certification.auditor_signature must validate against garage signing key using HMAC-SHA256.
validation_sequence.on_failure: BLOCK_MERGE: Certification signature is invalid. Possible tampering or key rotation.

validation_sequence.name: ARTIFACT_HASH_VALID
validation_sequence.description: Recompute SHA-256 hash of required artifacts listed in work_packet. Must match certification.artifact_hash.
validation_sequence.on_failure: BLOCK_MERGE: Artifact contents do not match certified hash. Files modified after certification.

ci_integration.trigger: Pull request to main or master branch.
ci_integration.branch_protection: Must be added to required status checks in GitHub branch protection settings.
ci_integration.fail_behavior: exit 1 on any check failure. No continue-on-error. Fail-closed.

validation_invariants: All 6 checks must pass. No partial pass. No advisory-only mode.
Checks are evaluated in order. First failure halts further evaluation.
No manual override. Override requires ADR at sovereign level + human approval.
Stale certifications (doctrine_version mismatch) are automatically invalid.
Tampered artifacts (hash mismatch) are automatically invalid.
Missing certification blocks merge. No PR merges without .garage/certification.json.
